title: Is there a plugin for creating a questionnaire that directs users to the proper Board Template to use?
excerpt: In our organization we have projects that are almost always identical, except for a few slight variations that lead to about ~30 different board templates. I’m curious if there is an app or plugin that would allow a user…

posts.author: cbuchanan (Cody Buchanan)
posts.cookedHtml:
In our organization we have projects that are almost always identical, except for a few slight variations that lead to about ~30 different board templates. I’m curious if there is an app or plugin that would allow a user who is generating a new project board to go through a series of customized questions and narrow down to the best template to use?

Example questions: (“Does the project require app “A”?) (Does the client already use tool “B”?) (Is this a standard timing or accelerated timing project?”)

Then depending on the answers provided by the user the questionnaire path would lead to the specific template to build off of.

Feels like a pipe dream, but I had to ask. Thank you in advance!
